_README: Question text for Q001-Q060. Text only - scoring lives in src/data/questions-scoring.json and is joined by id. Switching locale never changes scoring results.

questions.Q001: Picture something intimate you haven't tried yet. Out of all of it, what pulls at you first?
questions.Q002: Before you let go and explore something intimate, how much do you need to feel you're in good hands?
questions.Q003: Something stirs your curiosity. Do you want to put it into words first, or rather uncover it slowly?
questions.Q004: Mid intimate conversation, saying 'no' or 'not yet.' Does it come out easy, or does it catch in your throat?
questions.Q005: A candle lit, the right song, the space made ready before an intimate moment. How much does that ritual draw you in?
questions.Q006: A certain style, a piece of clothing, the way someone carries themselves into a room. How much does what you see move you?
questions.Q007: A soft brush of skin, a texture against you, someone close. How much weight does that carry in your curiosity?
questions.Q008: It happening out of nowhere, or building it on purpose and waiting for it. Which way do you lean?
questions.Q009: Catching that someone wants you, that they can't take their eyes off you. How much does that fire up your curiosity?
questions.Q010: Saying a fantasy out loud, knowing no one will hold you to it. How comfortable does that feel?
questions.Q011: Some fantasies play out almost like a film, with a scene, characters, a script. Do those kinds call to you?
questions.Q012: A more mischievous, playful version of you, one that only comes out in intimacy. How appealing is it to let it loose?
questions.Q013: After the heat, staying close: a slow caress, a hug that doesn't rush to end. How much does that part matter to you?
questions.Q014: One person taking the reins while the other lets go, all of it agreed beforehand. How much curiosity does that stir?
questions.Q015: A word, a signal, a pact to stop everything in an instant. How much do you need that within reach?
questions.Q016: Your most intimate curiosities, do you keep them under lock and key or out in the open?
questions.Q017: Even in couple mode, would you rather your results stay for your eyes only?
questions.Q018: Sharing a curiosity, but you decide what shows and what stays hidden. How comfortable does holding that control make you?
questions.Q019: Picture the app handing you topics to talk about without giving your secrets away. Would you want that?
questions.Q020: Seeing where your curiosity and your partner's land on the same spot. How useful would that be to you?
questions.Q021: Your partner is curious about something that doesn't call to you at all. How at peace does that leave you?
questions.Q022: When the two of you don't match on a curiosity, do you close the subject or give yourselves room to understand it calmly?
questions.Q023: Starting small, no sudden leaps, letting a shared curiosity grow on its own. How much does that gentle pace matter to you?
questions.Q024: Having the couple result show what you share first, and the differences after. Would you like it that way?
questions.Q025: Your firm boundaries, marked clearly as zones no one crosses. How much do you value the app guarding them like that?
questions.Q026: Something that intrigues you just to imagine, with zero intention of ever doing it. Has that happened to you?
questions.Q027: A corner of your own to sort out what you feel before telling anyone. Would something like that help?
questions.Q028: 'I'm curious' and 'I want to try it' aren't the same thing. How clear is that line for you?
questions.Q029: Writing the intimate stuff down before daring to say it out loud. How comfortable is that route for you?
questions.Q030: Opening up a desire and meeting respect on the other side, no mockery, no judgment. How much do you need that?
questions.Q031: Feeling admired, cared for, challenged, or surprised. Which of those pulls at you most?
questions.Q032: The lighting, the clothes, the music, the mood. How much does aesthetics live inside your desire?
questions.Q033: A low voice at your ear, a certain way of speaking, the right sound. How much does that count in your curiosity?
questions.Q034: Saying plainly what you like and what you don't. Are you drawn to conversations that direct?
questions.Q035: Asking for what you want, without the color rising to your face. How easy does it come to you?
questions.Q036: Something catching you by surprise, but inside what you already agreed on. How much does that mix appeal to you?
questions.Q037: Trying something new, knowing you can stop the second you want. How comfortable does that leave you?
questions.Q038: Afterward, talking about how it all felt instead of leaving it hanging. How much does that moment matter to you?
questions.Q039: Exploring desires that don't force you to change who you are or pick a label. Does that interest you?
questions.Q040: Your curiosity back then and your curiosity now, are they alike, or does it feel like it shifts over time?
questions.Q041: Physical, emotional, romantic, fantasy attraction. Do you feel them as separate, or do they blur into one?
questions.Q042: When you name your curiosity, does it come out more as energy, as connection, or as identity?
questions.Q043: A fantasy that doesn't have to say a thing about your orientation. How comfortable does that leave you?
questions.Q044: Some fantasies that stay only in your world, never leaving. How much do you need to keep that space for yourself?
questions.Q045: Intimate questions, but asked with care, nothing crude or graphic. How comfortable are you taking them in?
questions.Q046: A short, gentle quiz, or one that goes deep and into detail. Which one calls to you today?
questions.Q047: Skipping a question without it punishing your result. How much does having that out matter to you?
questions.Q048: Ideas to talk about more than suggestions of what to do. Which way do you lean?
questions.Q049: Learning new words to name what you feel and want. How open are you to that?
questions.Q050: Having the result speak of 'zones of curiosity' instead of dropping the word fetish on you. Would you like that?
questions.Q051: Feeling you have permission to explore at your own pace, no one rushing you. How much does that draw you?
questions.Q052: That what you answer here never becomes a lever to pressure you later. How much do you need that assurance?
questions.Q053: Having the couple report hand you phrases to start the hard conversations. Would you like that help?
questions.Q054: The app showing only where you overlap and quietly keeping your private differences. How comfortable does that leave you?
questions.Q055: Each of you answering on your own before seeing anything together. How much does that order matter to you?
questions.Q056: Finding ground where you're both curious, even if neither of you wants to touch it yet. Does that call to you?
questions.Q057: Laying out the boundaries before opening up the fantasies. How comfortable are you starting there?
questions.Q058: Exploring through laughter, no solemnity, not an ounce of judgment. How much does keeping it that light matter to you?
questions.Q059: Something to help you pull apart real desire from fear, pressure, and genuine curiosity. Would that interest you?
questions.Q060: At the end, what would you rather get: a brief summary, a deep report, or a guide to talk it through?
